codeReview.summary: The implementation fully covers the feature requirements. The monorepo structure, shared configs, and import boundary rules were bootstrapped in a previous commit (d3bdc09), and this commit (b9a0306) adds comprehensive smoke tests to verify all expected behaviors, ensuring the implementation meets all requirements.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker suggested: 'The skill could note that if the monorepo was already bootstrapped by a prior commit, the worker should focus on verification and test coverage rather than re-implementing from scratch.'

summary: Review passed. The worker properly verified the pre-existing monorepo structure and added comprehensive test coverage for all expected behaviors including workspace structure, entrypoints, root scripts, config inheritance, and import boundary rules.
